message:
🐛 Fix isChecking flag not reset on stop (#38)

Reset isChecking to false in stop() method so that when polling
restarts after page navigation, checkAgent() can run immediately
instead of being skipped.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
